name: tale-mode
description: Tale Mode — a discipline plugin for complex/high-stakes work, plus a self-armed autonomous goal loop.

plugins.name: tale-mode
plugins.description: Discipline mode (staged planning, receipts, verify-against-source, adversarial review) + plan/kickoff commands + a plan-reviewer agent + a Stop-hook autonomous goal loop (L1 deterministic gate + L2 read-only Sonnet governor).
